commit_scope: Make public deploy native-route canaries patient across rollout boundary responses while preserving hard failure behavior.

commands: VERIFY_WEB_API_DEPLOY_SOURCE_ONLY=1 bash -c 'source scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh https://api.example https://web.example; count=0; flaky_native_canary() { count=$((count + 1)); if [[ "$count" -lt 2 ]]; then echo "HTTP status: 200"; echo "X-Form-Router: <missing>"; echo "FAIL: kernel status route did not return native BML proof headers"; return 1; fi; echo "HTTP status: 200"; echo "X-Form-Router: native-kernel"; echo "PASS"; return 0; }; NATIVE_CANARY_PATIENCE_SECONDS=5 NATIVE_CANARY_PATIENCE_INTERVAL=0 check_native_canary_with_rollout "mock native canary" flaky_native_canary >/tmp/mock-native-canary.out; cat /tmp/mock-native-canary.out; test "$count" -eq 2; grep -q "settled after 2 attempt" /tmp/mock-native-canary.out'

VERIFY_WEB_API_DEPLOY_SOURCE_ONLY=1 bash -c 'source scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh https://api.example https://web.example; hard_failure() { echo "FAIL: contribution read bodies no longer match paginated read contract"; return 1; }; set +e; NATIVE_CANARY_PATIENCE_SECONDS=5 NATIVE_CANARY_PATIENCE_INTERVAL=0 check_native_canary_with_rollout "mock hard canary" hard_failure >/tmp/mock-hard-canary.out; rc=$?; set -e; cat /tmp/mock-hard-canary.out; if [[ "$rc" -eq 0 ]]; then echo "expected failure"; exit 1; fi; if grep -q "retrying" /tmp/mock-hard-canary.out; then echo "unexpected retry"; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.notes: The previous post-merge verification observed API/web SHA parity on the new commit but several native-route canaries briefly returned Python/front-door-missing responses during rollout, then passed on re-run after settling. The new wrapper retries the whole native canary only for rollout-shaped native proof/header failures, and keeps non-retriable body contract failures immediate. The settled public verifier passed end to end on 6885b2a5. Rebase with autostash completed cleanly, PR guard reported ready_for_push=True/local_preflight=pass, and follow-through reported stale_codex_prs=0.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR creation, and hosted checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy attempted before PR merge. Public verifier was run against the current settled production deployment and passed.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof and public settled verifier passed; PR CI, merge, and public post-merge verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: scripts/verify_web_api_deploy.sh adds check_native_canary_with_rollout around native-route canaries.
Mock flaky canary proves missing X-Form-Router/native proof headers retry and settle.
Mock hard body-contract failure proves non-rollout failures do not retry.
Full public verifier passed against settled production at 6885b2a5.
